name: Cocoa Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar until light.
2. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Add vanilla and mix until blended.
4. Sift dry ingredients together.
5. Add to creamed mixture alternately with milk, beating after each addition until blended.
6. Bake in 2 greased and floured 9x1 1/2-inch pans at 350°F for 25 minutes.
7. Butter sides of a heavy 3-quart saucepan.
8. Combine cocoa, sugar, corn syrup, salt, and milk.
9. Cook and stir over low heat until the sugar dissolves.
10. Continue cooking to soft ball stage (234°F) without stirring.
11. Remove from heat, add butter, and cool to warm (110°F) without stirring.
12. Add vanilla and beat until the mixture is of spreading consistency.
